name: Anise Sausage Stirfry
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (20 oz) chunk pineapple in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. In a wok or skillet, stir-fry sausage in 1 tablespoon oil for 1 minute. Remove sausage from the wok.
3. Add more oil as needed. Stir-fry garlic, onion, carrots, and ginger until the onion is soft.
4. Add broccoli to the pan; stir-fry until it becomes tender and crisp.
5. Stir in the pineapple with its juice.
6. Combine the reserved pineapple juice with the remaining ingredients (soy sauce, chicken broth, cornstarch, anise seed).
7. Pour everything back into the wok.
8. Stir and cook until the sauce boils and thickens.
9. Serve over rice. Serves 4.
